title: Reovirus Viral Purification
author: Bernardo Mainou
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.vj7e4rn
materials: Wipe bottom of tube with ethanol.

steps.title: Pellet 4x10 8 spinner-adapted L929 at...
steps.instruction: Pellet 4x10 8 spinner-adapted L929 at 2000 x g for 00:10:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Remove supernatant (can be added back...
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant (can be added back to 1 L bottle to be used during infection).

steps.title: Resuspend cells in total volume of...
steps.instruction: Resuspend cells in total volume of 40 mL, virus in Joklik’s Minimum Essential Media without supplements, JMEM . a. Adsorb for 01:00:00 at room temperature with passage 2 or viral prep supernatant at an MOI of 10 PFU/cell with gentle shaking on orbital shaker.

steps.title: Add adsorption mixture to 760 mL,...
steps.instruction: Add adsorption mixture to 760 mL, JMEM supplemented with 5% FBS, 2mM L-Glutamine, 100 U penicillin per ml, 100 ug streptomycin per ml, and 0.25 mg per ml amphotericin B

steps.title: Incubate on a spinner plate at...
steps.instruction: Incubate on a spinner plate at 34 °C - 37 °C with environmental CO 2 for 72:00:00 .

steps.title: Spin at 2500 x g for 00:10:00 at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Spin at 2500 x g for 00:10:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Remove supernatant and resuspend cells in 7 mL, HO buffer
steps.instruction: Remove supernatant and resuspend cells in 7 mL, HO buffer . Suspension may be stored at -20 °C - 80 °C at this step. If using immediately one freeze/thaw cycle is recommended. Supernatants of infections started with passage 2 reovirus can be stored at 80 °C and used for future viral purifications.

steps.title: Add 100 µL, 10% DOC per...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µL, 10% DOC per tube and incubate on ice for > 00:30:00 , vortexing every 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.5 mL, Vertrel XF .

steps.title: Sonicate on ice for 00:01:00 to...
steps.instruction: Sonicate on ice for 00:01:00 to disrupt cells and place on ice.

steps.title: Add additional 2
steps.instruction: Add additional 2.5 mL, Vertrel XF .

steps.title: Sonicate on ice for 00:01:00 to...
steps.instruction: Sonicate on ice for 00:01:00 to disrupt cells and place on ice.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 9700 x g for 00:10:00 at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 9700 x g for 00:10:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Transfer aqueous (top) layer to a...
steps.instruction: Transfer aqueous (top) layer to a clean tube and discard pellets.

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.5 mL, Vertrel XF .

steps.title: Sonicate on ice for 00:01:00 to...
steps.instruction: Sonicate on ice for 00:01:00 to disrupt cells and place on ice.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 9700 x g for 00:10:00 at 4 °C
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 9700 x g for 00:10:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: During second centrifugation step prepare CsCl gradient
steps.instruction: During second centrifugation step prepare CsCl gradient: a. Add 2.5 mL, 1.2 g/mL CsCl and gently underlay with 2.5 mL, 1.4 g/mL CsCl being careful to not mix layers.

steps.title: Carefully layer aqueous (top) fraction onto CsCl gradient
steps.instruction: Carefully layer aqueous (top) fraction onto CsCl gradient. Balance tubes with HO buffer.

steps.title: Spin at 25000 RPM overnight at 5 °C
steps.instruction: Spin at 25000 RPM overnight at 5 °C .

steps.title: Puncture the bottom of the tube with an 18
steps.instruction: Puncture the bottom of the tube with an 18.5-gauge needle.

steps.title: Collect virus fraction (bottom band) and...
steps.instruction: Collect virus fraction (bottom band) and top-component (top band) into a clean tube.

steps.title: Dialyze exhaustively against 400 mL -...
steps.instruction: Dialyze exhaustively against 400 mL - 500 mL, cold dialysis buffer for at least 24:00:00 at 4 °C . (Change buffer after 01:00:00 , 04:00:00 , and next morning).

steps.title: Transfer to new tube
steps.instruction: Transfer to new tube.

steps.title: Determine particle density (1 OD260 = 2
steps.instruction: Determine particle density (1 OD260 = 2.1 x 1012 particles/mL = 185 ug viral protein/mL).

steps.title: Store at 4 °C, Storage
steps.instruction: Store at 4 °C, Storage .
